name: Event-Driven Arbitrage Scanner (Tender Offer, Merger, SPAC, CEF, Rights)
description: AI Agent skill for scanning and analyzing 5 types of event-driven arbitrage opportunities: Tender Offer (with odd-lot priority), Cash Merger, SPAC NAV arbitrage, Closed-End Fund discount (activist catalyst), and Rights Offering over-subscription. The agent searches SEC EDGAR, spacresearch.com, CEFConnect, InsideArbitrage, and financial news to identify active opportunities, verifies terms through type-specific official filings, and generates ranked analysis reports with type-adapted spread calculations and risk assessments.
author: user
